name: QNI : Email Attachment with Executable
notes: This rule triggers when an email flow is received containing attachments with executable file extensions.
conditions_text: when a flow matches any of the following QNI : Email Attachment with Executable Hidden in Double File Extensions
when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Mail Applications in Flows
when the flow matches File Name is not N/A
when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Executable Extensions',REPLACEALL('.*\.(.+?)$',"file name",'$1')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Email Attachment with Executable on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when a flow matches any of the following QNI : Email Attachment with Executable Hidden in Double File Extensions
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Mail Applications in Flows
AND when the flow matches File Name is not N/A
AND when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Executable Extensions',REPLACEALL('.*\.(.+?)$',"file name",'$1')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Email Attachment with Executable
Event description: Detects when an email flow is received containing attachments with executable file extensions.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
